title: Use dynamic/2 for one optional filter
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.search/1` that takes a map with optional `:active` key (boolean). When `:active` is present, filter users by that value; when absent, return all users. Use `Ecto.Query.dynamic/2` to build the filter, not `if` chaining. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Minimal intro to dynamic/2 — one filter only. Easy if you know the pattern; legendary failure mode is not present here.
